set-release-version.description: Sets the published @spartan-ng package versions (brain, cli, mcp) in lockstep

brain-secondary-entrypoint.description: Add a secondary entrypoint to the Brain library

helm-secondary-entrypoint.description: Create a new Helm secondary entrypoint.

helm-story.description: Generate a story for a helm component.

helm-documentation.description: Generate a documentation page for a Helm component.

generate-primitive-snippets.description: Extracts code parts from primitive example and preview components.

update-contributors.description: Updates the README and three-hundred.ts with all Git contributors who are not already listed

generate-hlm-component-preview.description: Generate the hlm component with the correct tailwind classes instead of the spartan classes
